title: Bubble Chart view of a drop down column
excerpt: I’d Love to be able to create a bubble chart off of my drop down list column to illustrate the frequency they occur to use to review which should be addressed 1st and identify our most repeat offender

posts.author: ChristineWLF (Christine)
